23.kj: age, [phrase] always, [phrase] chronicals, continually(-ance), daily, ((birth-), each, to) day, (now a, two) days (agone), [phrase] elder, [idiom] end, [phrase] evening, [phrase] (
23.dv: from an unused root meaning to be hot;

23.gl: properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think, regard, value, compu
23.kj: (make) account (of), conceive, consider, count, cunning (man, work, workman), devise, esteem, find out, forecast, hold, imagine, impute, invent, be like, mean, purpose, reckon(-ing

23.gl: a collective name for a flock (of sheep or goats); also figuratively (of men)
23.dv: or צאוֹן; (Psalm 144:13), from an unused root meaning to migrate;

23.gl: {properly, something slaughtered; hence, a beast (or meat, as butchered); abstractly butchery (or concretely, a place of slaughter)}
23.dv: feminine of H2874 (טֶבַח) and meaning the same

23.kj: destroy, out of hand, kill, murder(-er), put to (death), make (slaughter), slay(-er), [idiom] surely.

24.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
24.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
24.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

24.gl: properly, a goal, i.e. the bright object at adistance travelled towards; hence (figuratively), splendor, or (subjectively) truthfulness, or (objectively) confidence; but usually (adverbially), continually (i.e. to the mo
24.kj: alway(-s), constantly, end, ([phrase] n-) ever(more), perpetual, strength, victory.

24.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
24.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.
(a-) wake(-n, up), lift up (self), [idiom] master, raise (up), stir up (self).
24.dv: a primitive root (rather identical with through the idea of opening the eyes);

24.gl: properly, to be slack or languid, i.e. (by implication) sleep (figuratively, to die); also to grow old, stale or inveterate

24.dv: a primitive root (identical with through the idea of abruptness in starting up from sleep (compare H3364 (יָקַץ)));

25.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
25.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
25.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

25.gl: properly, interrogative what? (including how? why? when?); but also exclamation, what! (including how!), or indefinitely what (including whatever, and even relatively, that which); often used with prefixes in various adv
25.kj: how (long, oft, (-soever)), (no-) thing, what (end, good, purpose, thing), whereby(-fore, -in, -to, -with), (for) why.
25.dv: or מַה; or מָ; or מַ; also מֶה; a primitive particle;

25.gl: to hide (by covering), literally or figuratively
25.kj: be absent, keep close, conceal, hide (self), (keep) secret, [idiom] surely.

25.gl: to mislay, i.e. to be oblivious of, from want of memory or attention

26.gl: properly, a breathing creature, i.e. animal of (abstractly) vitality; used very widely in a literal, accommodated or figurative sense (bodily or mental)
26.kj: any, appetite, beast, body, breath, creature, [idiom] dead(-ly), desire, [idiom] (dis-) contented, [idiom] fish, ghost, [phrase] greedy, he, heart(-y), (hath, [idiom] jeopardy of)

26.gl: properly, to impinge, i.e. cling or adhere; figuratively, to catch by pursuit
26.kj: abide fast, cleave (fast together), follow close (hard after), be joined (together), keep (fast), overtake, pursue hard, stick, take.

26.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
26.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
26.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

26.gl: the belly, especially the womb; also the bosom or body of anything
26.kj: belly, body, [phrase] as they be born, [phrase] within, womb.
26.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be hollow;

26.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
26.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.
